title: Grayscale Hover Effect
description: Create a gallery of images that are grayscale by default and transition to full color on hover.
hint: Use filter: grayscale(1) on the default state and grayscale(0) on :hover, with a transition.
criteria: Smooth transition to color on hover

title: Glassmorphism Card
description: Create a glass-effect card using backdrop-filter with a colorful background behind it.
hint: Use backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(1.4) on a semi-transparent card over a gradient background.

title: Photo Filter Presets
description: Build an interactive photo editor with preset filter buttons (vintage, noir, vibrant, etc.) that apply multiple combined filters.
hint: Define preset objects with multiple filter values and apply them all at once to the image.

title: Animated Filter Carousel
description: Create a CSS keyframe animation that cycles through different filter combinations on an image.
hint: Use @keyframes with filter values at different percentages (0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%).
criteria: Animation with at least 4 keyframe stops
